div.h1: Water Quality Monitoring for Smart Farms
div.p: A modern water quality dashboard for pH, EC, TDS, Salinity, Specific Gravity and Temperature with live telemetry simulation and future-ready sensor integration.

div.class: card rounded-4 shadow-sm border-0 p-4 text-center
div.style: min-height: 320px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(24,165,107,0.08), rgba(99,102,241,0.08));

div.p: Responsive water quality charts, device health and alert panels built for Odoo 18.

div.class: card shadow-sm rounded-4 border-0 p-4 h-100
div.p: See all six water quality metrics in a single connected monitoring solution designed for aquaculture, hydroponics and environmental sensing.

div.class: card shadow-sm rounded-4 border-0 p-4 h-100
div.p: Live charts update every second using realistic simulated sensor drift, ready for MQTT and IoT gateway integration.

div.class: card shadow-sm rounded-4 border-0 p-4 h-100
div.p: Built with Odoo 18, OWL, Chart.js and modular service architecture so real hardware can be dropped in later.
Live insight into pH, EC, TDS, Salinity, Specific Gravity and Temperature, with status alerts, device health and sensor trends.

ul.li: • Responsive design for desktop, tablet, mobile
• Realistic simulation today, real sensors tomorrow

div.class: card rounded-4 shadow-sm border-0 p-4 h-100
div.p: White cards, green accents, rounded corners and elegant spacing inspired by cloud dashboards and SCADA UI.

div.class: card rounded-4 shadow-sm border-0 p-4 h-100
div.p: Abstracted sensor service means MQTT, REST or ESP32 data sources can replace simulation without frontend rewrites.

div.class: card rounded-4 shadow-sm border-0 p-4 h-100
div.p: Full Odoo 18 Community compatibility with backend modularity, website pages, and dashboard action integration.
Contact KebunData to integrate live water quality telemetry into your farm, greenhouse, or industrial system.
